findings.evidence_quote:
if not q.connector or q.connector == AND:
    return self._filter_or_exclude_no_neg(q)
findings.reasoning: The connector-or-AND short-circuit returns without honoring a negated Q; downstream query cloning may attach a negated sub-clause that this path silently skips. Two of the three public callers in the slice rely on negation being preserved.
Tuple ordering on select relies on dict iteration order from the upstream query; co-change history shows four regression fixes tied to this region in 18 months.
